steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: In $f(x)=42-0.16x$, the constant term is the value when $x=0$. Since $x$ is days after the experiment began, $x=0$ means the start of the experiment.

steps.title: Interpret the constant
steps.content: $$f(0)=42-0.16(0)=42$$So $42$ is the estimated height of the liquid, in centimeters, at the start of the experiment. The answer is A.
